summary: Good matrix recording captures a mellow Jerry performance with stretched‑out Mississippi Half‑Step and a spooky The Other One, plus two encores.
review: The show is praised for its relaxed vibe – Jerry’s guitar is notably mellow and the band stretches out the songs, delivering a smooth Mississippi Half‑Step and a nicely eerie stretch in The Other One. Recording quality is described as pretty good with an occasional odd mix, typical of a matrix source, but overall it serves the music well.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review (4‑star) which highlights both solid musical performance and decent recording quality; rating reflects a good show with minor mix quirks.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Pretty good sound overall, but the mix is slightly odd at times.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Mellow, stretched‑out feel with two encores; songs are smooth and laid‑back, creating a relaxed second‑half atmosphere.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Described as really mellow and laid‑back, which the reviewer liked.
